name: nat-vent-outdoor-warmer-no-activate
description: Sensor opens; outdoor 75F >= indoor 74F — directional guard prevents nat vent activation

verdict.summary: When outdoor temp equals or exceeds indoor, nat vent must not activate

events.note: outdoor 75F > indoor 74F — directional guard should block nat vent
sensor opens; outdoor already warmer than indoor

assertions.reason: outdoor 75F >= indoor 74F — pulling in warmer air; directional guard blocks nat vent
